title: she_load_key: M1-M5 caller-computation contract undocumented
description: she.rs: she_load_key takes m1/m2/m3 as byte arrays but does not document that these must be computed according to the SHE AutoSAR key-loading protocol. A contributor cannot pass arbitrary bytes; they must be derived via a specific cryptographic computation involving the old key, new key, counter, and UID. Without this, a contributor will pass random inputs, get a failure, and have no idea why. Fix: add a doc comment stating M1/M2/M3 must be computed per the SHE AutoSAR CMD_LOAD_KEY protocol, and reference wh_she_crypto.h or the spec section.
